user.title: Lawn irrigation settings
user.description: The initial form asks for the main zones and weather fields first. You can then complete the specialized sensors in Options. The weather entity can also serve as a fallback for temperature, apparent temperature, humidity, wind, pressure, and tomorrow's rain. If you do not know the flow rate, leave 60.

data.capteur_humidite: Air humidity (%) (optional if weather is provided)

set_mode.name: Set mode
set_mode.description: Chooses a mode (Overseeding, Treatment, etc.) and updates the calculations.

set_date_action.name: Record date
set_date_action.description: Sets the real date of the intervention (YYYY-MM-DD). If empty, today is used.

reset_mode.name: Back to normal mode
reset_mode.description: Resets the system to Normal mode.

start_manual_irrigation.name: Manual watering
start_manual_irrigation.description: Starts a manual watering cycle and specifies how much water to apply in mm.

objectif_mm.name: Water to apply
objectif_mm.description: Amount of water to apply in millimeters.

start_auto_irrigation.name: Automatic watering
start_auto_irrigation.description: Runs each zone in sequence with the configured flow rate. If the water amount is empty, it uses the calculated value automatically.

objectif_mm.name: Water to apply (optional)
objectif_mm.description: Water amount in mm. If omitted, uses the objective calculated by the current mode.

declare_intervention.name: Declare an intervention
declare_intervention.description: Logs a real intervention to feed the decision engine.

date_action.name: Action date (optional)
date_action.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. If empty, today is used.

declare_mowing.name: Declare mowing
declare_mowing.description: Logs a mowing event in the history.

date_action.name: Mowing date (optional)
date_action.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. If empty, today is used.

declare_watering.name: Declare watering
declare_watering.description: Logs a watering event in the history.

date_action.name: Watering date (optional)
date_action.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. If empty, today is used.

objectif_mm.name: Applied amount (optional)
objectif_mm.description: Amount of water applied in mm.
